Dialog.name: MSG_HIGHRARE_DEFEAT_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5088 0 0}Greedy Shadow defeated! Nice job![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}We managed to recover the treasure it was hoarding, too![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DEFEAT_YUKARI_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1087 0 0}I'm beat... But I feel accomplished since it worked out in the end.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DEFEAT_JUNPEI_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2086 0 0}There's no way it could've escaped from me, Junpei the Lord of Speed.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DEFEAT_SANADA_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3085 0 0}That was some pretty good footwork, but we were a cut above.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DEFEAT_MITSURU_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4085 0 0}That was quite an endeavor, but at least it was worth it in the end.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DEFEAT_AEGIS_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6087 0 0}Mission successful. That was a good workout experience.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DEFEAT_AMADA_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7088 0 0}We did it! You know... chasing it was kinda fun...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DEFEAT_ARAGAKI_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9082 0 0}Sheesh, damn bastard made us chase it like some field day event... Well, at least it went well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_HIGHRARE_ESCAPE_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5123 0 0}I'm glad you're all safe. It's too bad it got away...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 -1 50 0 0}It seems it took off with all the treasure on this floor too...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ESCAPE_YUKARI_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1022 0 0}Ugh, after we ran around so much, too! That's totally cheating.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ESCAPE_JUNPEI_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2092 0 0}I can't believe I screwed this up! We'll kick its ass for sure next time![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ESCAPE_SANADA_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3091 0 0}That was a big catch we lost... We'll have our revenge next time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ESCAPE_MITSURU_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4092 0 0}It seems our opponent was one step ahead of us this time... Well, we'll just have to be more prepared.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ESCAPE_AEGIS_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6060 0 0}It found a complete upper hand on us. I suppose this would be a case of the enemy being "damn impressive."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ESCAPE_AMADA_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7094 0 0}Oh well, we did our best. Chasing it was kinda fun, though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ESCAPE_ARAGAKI_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9130 0 0}Talk about a damn fast runner... Heh, guess I'm a sore loser.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_HIGHRARE_ESCAPE_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5066 0 0}Oh... But it seems that Shadow dropped something while running away.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_HIGHRARE_END_FUKA_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}At least I now have a full grasp of this floor's layout, thanks to us chasing it down.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}I'll guide you to the stairs.[n]{f 1 1}
